calendar.matters:
COMPLIANCE HEARING
Off Calendar Jun-04-2025 Continued To Jun-03-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

The Compliance Hearing is continued to June 3, 2026, at 9:00 am in this department.

At least ten court days prior to the continued hearing date, the Settlement Administrator shall file admissible testimony by way of declaration identifying the status of the discovery funds now in their control and the status of their transfer to the Controller. If there are any substantive issues to discuss, at least ten court days prior to the continued hearing date Plaintiff's counsel shall file an explanatory memorandum.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2024 Off Calendar

FINAL APPROVAL HEARING
Off Calendar Jun-04-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. JACKLAND HOM, Esq. of Zakay Law Group, APLC (tel: 619-892-7095) for Plaintiffs.
Atty. NEIL EDDINGTON, Esq. of K&L Gates LLP (tel: 310-552-5000) for Defendants.

Hearing Re: FINAL APPROVAL HEARING.

Matter discussed. The Court inquires as to whether anybody opposes this motion. There being no opposition, the Court grants the motion for final approval of class action and PAGA settlement. The Court further schedules a compliance hearing to June 4, 2025, at 9:30 A.M. in Department 302.

Order signed. Judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

Atty. NEIL EDDINGTON, Esq. of K&L Gates LLP (tel: 310-552-5000) for Defendants.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF KALIYAH MARTIN's Motion For Attorney'S Fees And Expenses And Enhancement Award.

Matter discussed. The Court inquires as to whether anybody opposes this motion. There being no opposition, the Court grants the Motion For Attorney's Fees And Expenses And Enhancement Award. The Court further schedules a compliance hearing to June 4, 2025, at 9:30 A.M. in Department 302.

Order signed. Judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action And Paga Settlement
Off Calendar Jun-04-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. JACKLAND HOM, Esq. of Zakay Law Group, APLC (tel: 619-892-7095) for Plaintiffs.
Atty. NEIL EDDINGTON, Esq. of K&L Gates LLP (tel: 310-552-5000) for Defendants.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF KALIYAH MARTIN's Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action And Paga Settlement.

Matter discussed. The Court inquires as to whether anybody opposes this motion. There being no opposition, the Court grants the motion for final approval of class action and PAGA settlement. The Court further schedules a compliance hearing to June 4, 2025, at 9:30 A.M. in Department 302.

Order signed. Judgment signed.

Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action And Paga Settlement
Off Calendar Jan-04-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JULIEANN ALVARADO, Esq. of Zakay Law Group, APLC (Tel: 619-255-9047) for plaintiff;
Atty. PENNY CHEN, Esq. of K&L Gates LLP (Tel: 310-553-5000) for defendants Blend Operations, Inc., Blend Labs, Inc., Blend Title Insurance Agency, Inc., and Blend Insurance Agency, Inc.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF KALIYAH MARTIN's Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action And PAGA Settlement.

Matter discussed. The Court rules as follows: Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for preliminary approval of class action and PAGA settlement" is granted. A Final Approval Hearing is set for June 4, 2024 at 9:30 a.m.

Plaintiff's counsel is instructed to prepare and submit a proposed order for review/signature.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
